title: citrus × papillaris var. chrysocarpa
intro: Citrus × papillaris var. chrysocarpa, also known as the yellow or golden passionfruit, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the passionfruit plant, characterized by its unique yellow skin and sweet, juicy pulp. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Citrus × papillaris var. chrysocarpa include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the fruit and leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
